'''Grobber''' was an underling of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], sent by [[Zekka Thyne]] to capture Rebel agent [[Riij Winward]] and [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] [[Maranne Darmic]] in [[Mynock's Haven]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet]], on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. He was also a member of the [[Brommstaad Mercenaries]].
